THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERRITT, LARRY TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION, AN AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER & JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-08-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
